calls.notes: Constructs URL string: `${API_BASE_URL}/documents/${id}/preview`. No HTTP call made here — URL string is passed as `file` prop to react-pdf and as `src` on . Actual HTTP GET is initiated by the browser or react-pdf.

Anti-pattern: utility imported from a 800-line god component. Converts raw byte count to human-readable string (B / KB / MB / GB / TB). Guarded by `document.file_size &&` so it is only called when the prop is present and non-zero.

handlers.notes: Callback registered on react-pdf <Document onLoadSuccess>. Sets numPages and clears loading=false in component state. Triggers re-render to show page count and hide 'Loading PDF...' message.
Callback registered on react-pdf <Document onLoadError>. Sets error=error.message and loading=false. Triggers re-render to show red error message in place of PDF content.

calls.notes: SELECT * FROM documents_v2 WHERE id = $1. Returns the document row to obtain file_path (physical disk path) and file_type (MIME type). Returns 404 JSON if id not found or file not on disk.
